core_prompt: A high-resolution scanning electron micrograph of a podocyte cell, capturing the intricate architecture of major processes and interdigitating pedicels wrapping around a glomerular capillary, Nature journal scientific aesthetic, monochromatic grayscale, ultra-fine biological textures, clean and minimalist background.
negative_prompt: plastic skin, over-retouched, deformed fingers, warped text, watermarks, CGI, 3D render, vibrant colors, neon, blurry textures, messy environment
